// purpose: CI typecheck of production source only. Test files live in src/__tests__ and transitively import from web/src/routes, which pulls web (SvelteKit) files into root tsc's graph without its `$server`/`$lib`/`./$types` aliases. Excluding tests here keeps the root check focused on backend src/. Web (web/) is type-checked separately via scripts/typecheck.sh → `cd web && tsc`.
// browser code: The graded-card-scanner extension ships a browser SPA under app/ (getUserMedia, IndexedDB, DOM). Those files are @ts-check'd against the DOM lib at dev time and covered by unit + e2e tests; they must NOT be pulled into this backend (ESNext-lib, no DOM) program, or `document`/`window`/`IDBDatabase` resolve as errors. The subprocess still imports app/lib/cert.js + mock-card.js, which are DOM-free and stay type-checked via those imports.
